rationale: In the citing paper, Rutz and Bucklin (2011) appears in a grouped citation in the related-literature section as one example of prior work documenting advertising spillover effects. The citation is used to broadly map the existing digital advertising dynamics literature, not to build a specific hypothesis, mechanism, model component, or empirical design choice in this study. There is no distinct discussion of that paper's findings or direct reuse of its framework beyond this background positioning.
